'''thasusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearmonger|fearmonger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearmonger|fearmonger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thasusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsisith|thæsisith]] || [[word:thæsisij|thæsisij]] || [[word:thæsisish|thæsisish]] || [[word:thæsisi|thæsisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasususuth|thasususuth]] || [[word:thasususuj|thasususuj]] || [[word:thasususush|thasususush]] || [[word:thasususu|thasususu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasusuth|thasusuth]] || [[word:thasusuj|thasusuj]] || [[word:thasusush|thasusush]] || [[word:thasusu|thasusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasufsuth|thasufsuth]] || [[word:thasufsuj|thasufsuj]] || [[word:thasufsush|thasufsush]] || [[word:thasufsuf|thasufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasusuthu|thasusuthu]] || [[word:thasusuju|thasusuju]] || [[word:thasusushu|thasusushu]] || [[word:thasusuku|thasusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasusuth|thasusuth]] || [[word:thasusuj|thasusuj]] || [[word:thasusush|thasusush]] || [[word:thasusu|thasusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasusuthul|thasusuthul]] || [[word:thasusujul|thasusujul]] || [[word:thasusushul|thasusushul]] || [[word:thasusukul|thasusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasusuthuthu|thasusuthuthu]] || [[word:thasusujuju|thasusujuju]] || [[word:thasusushushu|thasusushushu]] || [[word:thasusuku|thasusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasusuthun|thasusuthun]] || [[word:thasusujun|thasusujun]] || [[word:thasusushun|thasusushun]] || [[word:thasusukun|thasusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasusuthuoro|thasusuthuoro]] || [[word:thasusujuoro|thasusujuoro]] || [[word:thasusushuoro|thasusushuoro]] || [[word:thasusukuoro|thasusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
